name: Full Circle Golf
about: Full Circle Golf is a virtual golf facility and training studio located in Berlin, CT, offering both advanced golf simulation technology and professional instruction. The venue provides high-resolution simulators with real course data and features an academy for golf lessons and club fitting. It is open daily and caters to a range of activities including family fun, corporate events, children's parties, and date nights. Pricing is based on per-bay or per-lesson sessions with options for packages and discounted rates during certain seasons.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators using real course data
Professional golf lessons and club fitting services
Family-friendly environment with dedicated party packages
Flexible pricing options for lessons and simulator time

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks available for events and parties
Cocktails and drinks available for date nights and events

simulator_hardware.notes: High-resolution digital-image and satellite data simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs. The facility also offers club rentals and fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The facility provides snacks and cocktails, but BYOB policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Full Circle Golf offers dedicated children's party packages with kid-friendly simulators and activities.
